text: Stepping into this environment, I am enveloped by a hum of anticipation and intellect. The glassy divide between hallway and exhibition room creates a sense of both barrier and invitation. The blue neon glow and displays inside hint at innovation, sparking my philosophical curiosity: What kinds of ideas are incubated here? The brightly-lit 'R+D' wall suggests restless, ongoing inquiry. I feel both separated from and drawn toward this space of research and reflection—a liminal moment, enticing and full of possibility.
